features: CLASSIC DESIGN: The classic design has a nostalgic feel, yet still features the modern essentials such as an earphone socket and access to the latest AM/FM radio stations. The compact size, complete with telescopic swivel antenna, offers a retro personal radio great to carry with you along on a trip or while you?re out and about.

EASY TO USE: The simple design allows for easy set-up and operation, suitable for all to enjoy. Tune into your favourite AM and FM stations by searching on the tuner for different frequencies and watching the tuning window. Rotate the rotary dial to search between stations and the smaller dial on the opposite side to adjust the volume level.

SPEAKER OR EARPHONES: This radio has an earphone socket and comes complete with a pair of stereo earphones. Use the built-in speaker to enjoy listening or alternatively plug in the included earphones for private listening.

PORTABLE WITH CARRY STRAP: The LLOYTRON "Entertainer" 2 Band Personal Sports Radio is small and light enough to carry with you, making it ideal for travelling, camping trips, walking, fishing and more. Extend the telescopic antenna for better reception of radio signals.
BATTERY OPERATED: To power, simply insert 2 x AA batteries (not included). Use your personal sports radio wirelessly without the need to plug in or recharge.
description: From the manufacturer The radio with FM and AM bands offers a wide range of listening options for users to enjoy their favourite music, news, and talk radio programs. With both FM and AM bands available, this versatile device ensures that you can tune in to a variety of radio stations to suit your preferences. Enhance your listening experience with its clear sound quality and reliable reception. The radio, powered by 2 AA batteries, is a highly portable and versatile device that allows you to enjoy your favorite music and radio stations on the go. Its compact design and battery-powered operation make it perfect for travel, outdoor activities, or simply enjoying music at home without the need for a power outlet. The personal radio with earphones is a compact and portable device that allows you to enjoy your favourite music and listen to your preferred radio stations on the go. Its lightweight design and comfortable earphones make it easy to carry and use during various activities such as exercise, commuting, or relaxing. Presenting the ultimate radio gift package, delivered in a sleek and compact design. This radio comes neatly packaged in a stylish gift box, perfect for any occasion. The box itself features all the necessary specifications, allowing you to easily identify the radio's functionalities at a glance.
